_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: However, the SCEP of the LV-NF-1 NSC-treated rats with SCI was stronger than that of the SCI+LV-vector NSC and control groups, expressed as shorter latency and higher amplitude
details: SCEP of LV-NF-1 NSC-treated rats showed stronger responses than control groups, expressed as shorter latency and higher amplitude at 8 weeks post-SCI
